The '''CX-5011 PeopleMover''' was a personnel [[Transport/Legends|transport]] that was manufactured by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] and utilized by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
Measuring forty-two [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, the ship carried one pilot, up to twenty troops, seventy-five metric tons of cargo, and one month's worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]]. It had a Class 2 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] as well as a backup of uncertain class. The craft boasted modest shields and a single [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] for defense.

{{Ship-stub}}
